title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Britannia Industries

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Britannia Industries
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
